name: @quoin/prim-sequence
description: Sequence primitive — ordered/contextual list of items with separator + position-semantic state. Variants represent sequence semantics (breadcrumb / ordered-list / unordered-list / sidebar-vertical). Consolidated from inlined breadcrumb + sidebar-section contracts per Phase 22 Cons. 6.
consolidates: inlined sidebar-list contract (in nav-docs as nav-sidebar-section)
